project_activation_alignment.notes: Project residual logging uses user-facing 1-based layer numbers and hooks blocks[layer - 1], so model.layers.18.output aligns with project logger layer 19. Do not compare this directly to existing project layer-18 activations unless importing the matching Gemma Scope layer-17 SAE instead.

notes: Imported as a general pretrained SAE baseline for comparing curated emotion/risk/realization prompts against a broad Gemma Scope SAE after matching residual layer alignment.
